options.label: A
options.text: How fast something is moving in a specific direction

options.label: B
options.text: How fast something is moving regardless of direction

options.label: C
options.text: The distance an object has travelled

options.label: D
options.text: The time it takes to travel somewhere

explanation: Speed is a measure of how fast something is moving, without regard to direction. If direction is included, that's called velocity. Speed is calculated by dividing distance by time.
